tools.name: getAssistantInstructions
tools.description: Operational guidelines for the AI. Call first.

tools.name: getProductData
tools.description: Full product sheet: description, standard features, options, accessories, manuals. E.g.: "PUMA ACD".

tools.name: getTechnicalSpecs
tools.description: Precise technical data: power, airflow, vacuum, filter, dimensions, weight, Atex marking.

tools.name: getProductAccessories
tools.description: Compatible accessories with codes and images. E.g.: antistatic kits, lances, brushes.

tools.name: configureProduct
tools.description: Find products matching a need. E.g.: "wood dust in Atex zone 22", "CNC oil 280L".

tools.name: getFilterOptions
tools.description: Available product search criteria (materials, sectors, certifications, Atex zones, power, capacity, etc.). Call before configureProduct.

tools.name: getApplications
tools.description: Materials that can be vacuumed. E.g.: combustible dust, welding fumes, oils, liquids.

tools.name: getSectors
tools.description: Industrial sectors. E.g.: food, pharmaceutical, 3D printing, metalworking.

tools.name: getProductTypes
tools.description: Product types. E.g.: mobile vacuum, fixed dust collector, pre-separator.

tools.name: getZoneTypes
tools.description: Certified Atex zones. E.g.: zone 22, zone 21, ordinary.

tools.name: getUsages
tools.description: Usage mode: occasional or continuous.

tools.name: getPowerSupplies
tools.description: Available power supplies. E.g.: electric, compressed air, battery.

tools.name: getCertificates
tools.description: Available certifications. E.g.: CE, Atex, Type H dust.

tools.name: getCollectionSystems
tools.description: Collection systems. E.g.: stainless steel container, Longopac, inert liquid bath.

tools.name: getCollectionCapacities
tools.description: Container capacities. E.g.: 20-50L, 51-100L, over 300L.

tools.name: getProductCategories
tools.description: Product safety categories. E.g.: ACD, Atex 1/2D, 1/3D, 3D.

tools.name: getFilterCleaningSystems
tools.description: Filter cleaning. E.g.: manual, Jet Clean, automatic backflush.

tools.name: getStructures
tools.description: Product structure: mobile or fixed.

tools.name: getPowerValues
tools.description: Total product power ranges.

tools.name: getMotorPowerValues
tools.description: Motor power values in kW/HP.
